retry_reason: The put only occurs if the DOI is found; failure (ENOENT) means the DOI does not exist, which is a permanent condition unless the DOI is later added again, but retrying the same operation will not make the DOI appear.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to remove a DOI from a list and log the action; the call to calipso_doi_putdef is a necessary consequence of removal, not the main purpose. The function also performs list search, list manipulation, and audit logging, indicating significant non-refcount logic.
